category: Acute Coronary Syndrome (e.g. myocardial infarction, unstable angina)
Cardiac ischemic (e.g. ACS, stable angina, coronary vasospasm, supply / demand mismatch, coronary dissection)
Cardiac non-ischemic (e.g. non-ischemic cardiomyopathy, takotsubu, myopericarditis, arrhythmia, structural / valvular)
Pulmonary (e.g. pneumonia, pneumothorax, post-viral pleurisy, pleural effusion(s))
Vascular (e.g. aortic dissection, pulmonary embolism, large vessel vasculitis)
Benign Uterine Mass (fibroid, adenoma, endometrial hyperplasia, adenomyosis)
Malignant Uterine Mass (e.g. endometrial cancer, leiomyosarcoma)
